title: Mosaic Masonry
description: Mosaic masonry is a small mod that adds 9 new brick types to aid in vareity of brick textures when building
body:
# Mosaic Masonry
Mosaic masonry is a small mod that adds 9 new brick types to aid in vareity of brick textures when building

![all the bricks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/JntdhfUA/images/04b1456869f592885f0f557c9c3237cf4f5533c1.png)

## The features
This mod adds 9 new brick types obtained by putting a vanilla brick in a stonecutter. These are what are added:

From reality:
 - Stack bond
 - Flemish bond
 - Header bond
 - English bond
 - Common bond

From minecraft: 
 - Prismarine bond
 - Quartz bond
 - Mud bond
 - Stone bond

### Notes
If you enjoy this mod, you might also enjoy my other mod; [Mosaic Carpentry](https://modrinth.com/mod/mosaic-carpentry)!

If you encounter any bugs, have any suggestions, or want to talk with another fan of my mods, join my [Discord server](https://discord.gg/VEqBsVaQFy)!

[Here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mosaic-masonry) is the version of this mod hosted on Curseforge.

Trans rights 🏳️‍⚧️
